The following materials from Intuitive Surgical, Inc.’s Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2010, formatted in

Consolidated Statement of Stockholders’ Equity, (iv) Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows, and (v) Notes to Consolidated Financial
Statements, tagged at Level I through IV.
